Findro

Property Rental Application

A full-featured property rental platform connecting property owners and tenants. Findro delivers a seamless experience for discovering, listing, and managing rental properties with real-time updates and smart filtering.

  • Property listing with rich media and details
  • Advanced search and filtering by location, price, and type
  • User and owner dashboard with analytics
  • Real-time updates via Firebase
  • Secure authentication system
  • Modern, responsive UI with smooth animations

Kotlin Firebase MVVM Google Maps Retrofit

To Go Cart

Grocery Delivery Application

A comprehensive grocery delivery application that brings the supermarket to your doorstep. Features real-time order management, smart cart system, and location-based delivery tracking for a complete shopping experience.

  • Full grocery ordering system with categories
  • Real-time order management and tracking
  • Intelligent cart with offers and discounts
  • Location integration with Google Maps
  • Secure authentication and user profiles
  • Order history and re-order functionality
⬡ GitHub
Kotlin Firebase MVVM Maps API Room DB

Rent To Ride

Vehicle Renting Application

A modern vehicle rental platform offering bikes and vehicles for rent with real-time availability, seamless booking, and comprehensive management. Built for performance with a clean, intuitive interface.

  • Vehicle booking system with date & time selection
  • Bike and vehicle catalog with filters
  • Real-time availability updates via Firebase
  • Booking management and history
  • Responsive modern UI with smooth transitions
  • Secure authentication and user management

Music Player

Android Music Streaming App

A feature-rich Android music player with a premium UI built using Kotlin and ExoPlayer. Delivers a seamless listening experience with playlist management, a beautiful now-playing screen, library organisation, and background playback.

  • Now Playing screen with animated album art and controls
  • Full playlist management and song queuing
  • Explore screen with trending songs and genre categories
  • Personal library with liked songs and custom playlists
  • Background playback with notification media controls
  • Equaliser and audio enhancement support
